summary: A mobile-first recipe sharing app where university students post, discover and save cheap, quick meals.

stories.want: to filter recipes by prep time and cost
stories.so: I can cook something real between classes
acceptance: Feed shows prep-time and cost badges on every card
Filtering by max time updates results in under a second

stories.want: to post a recipe with photos and steps
stories.so: I can share my cheap go-to meals
acceptance: Form validates title, at least one step and one photo
Posted recipe appears in the feed immediately

stories.so: I can find my favourites again quickly
acceptance: Save toggle works from feed and detail views

stories.want: to review and remove reported content
acceptance: Reported recipes appear in a review queue
Removing a recipe hides it from all feeds within a minute
